title: Top o' the Morning
writer: Anne Caldwell, George Randolph Chester, Wallace Clifton
actors: Gladys Walton, Harry Myers, Doreen Turner
plot: Jerry O'Donnell arrives from Ireland to be with her father in America, but when she finds living with her stepmother unpleasant, she leaves home and encourages millionaire John Garland, whom she knew in Ireland, now a widower. Gar...
